<includeonly>0</includeonly><noinclude>
This page holds a single integer: the [[Template:DPLA duplicate]] moving-window
cutoff. A file tagged with <code><nowiki>{{DPLA duplicate}}</nowiki></code> is
released into [[:Category:Duplicate]] when its <code>ts</code> sort key is less
than this value.

It is maintained automatically by the <code>dpla-dup-window</code> scheduled
job, which advances it just enough to keep the target number of DPLA files
visible to administrators as they clear the queue. The value is monotonic and
starts at <code>0</code> (nothing released).

'''Do not edit this page by hand.''' See [[Template:DPLA duplicate/doc]].
</noinclude>
